scripts.start:cliente: cd services/apiportalclienteap && nodemon --ignore api/swagger server.js api/database/dbapi.sqlite server.js
scripts.start:motorista: cd services/apiappmotorista && nodemon --ignore api/swagger server.js server.js
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:cliente" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:motorista"
scripts.start:dev: concurrently "nodemon --ignore services/* server.js" "npm run start:cliente" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:motorista"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd services/api-cliente && npm install && cd ../api-admin && npm install && cd ../api-motorista && npm install
